gist.headline: Watering the greenhouse
gist.blurb: Our automated bots just finished their daily rounds, updating app metrics and checking on the greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse status.
gist.impact: Keeps the community app directory and greenhouse documentation up to date with the latest health and usage metrics.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about automated metrics updating and checking on the 'greenhouse' (community apps). The robot companion and the bee tending to a digital greenhouse or watering code-plants perfectly represents this automated maintenance.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head and the tiny bee mascot watering glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel mint gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head and the tiny bee mascot watering glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse.
